opinion.h4: WAGNER v. INTERNATIONAL BROTHERHOOD OF ELECTRICIANS, LOCAL NO. 1305, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 300. Decided October 19, 1959.
opinion.p: Carl E. Glock for the Pittsburgh & Lake Erie Railroad Co., and Loyal H. Gregg and Richard R. Lyman for the International Brotherhood of Electricians, Local No. 1305, appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
